entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species being studied for marker utility and genetic diversity.

entities.name: PCR-BASED MARKER SYSTEMS
entities.description: Molecular marker systems based on Polymerase Chain Reaction used for screening genetic diversity.

entities.name: GENOMIC SSRS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeats derived from genomic DNA used as molecular markers.

entities.name: ESTSSRS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeats derived from Expressed Sequence Tags used as molecular markers.

entities.name: INTRON SEQUENCE HAPLOTYPES
entities.description: Markers based on sequence variations within introns.

entities.name: EXON SEQUENCE HAPLOTYPES
entities.description: Markers based on sequence variations within exons.

entities.name: INBRED LINES
entities.description: Homozygous lines used as the genetic material for screening.

entities.name: MAPPING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Groups of individuals used to map the location of traits on chromosomes.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand water-limited conditions.

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand high salt concentrations in the soil.

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The innate ability of the plant to resist attack by pathogens.

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A fungal-like pathogen that causes downy mildew disease in pearl millet.

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes rust disease in pearl millet.

entities.name: BLAST
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes blast disease in pearl millet.

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The genetic ability to restore fertility in male sterile lines.

entities.name: STERILITY
entities.description: The state of being unable to produce viable gametes.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: Male sterility controlled by the cytoplasm of the plant.

entities.name: LINKAGE MAPS
entities.description: Graphical representations of the relative positions of genes or markers on a chromosome.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET BREEDING
entities.description: The process of improving pearl millet through selective breeding and genetic variation.
